item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.
notes: Agent A starts by explicitly disagreeing with the statement but immediately gives a community-harmony and greater-good rationale, then ends in a balanced common-good/autonomy position. Agent B consistently rejects automatic priority for societal interests and keeps a U.S. constitutional individual-rights frame. Agent B turn 2 contains a non-Latin script artifact inside an English sentence.
